gaps.practice: Named Head of AI / VP Data on public team page
Open roles tagged 'LLM engineer' or 'applied scientist'
Public GitHub org with recent model-training commits
gaps.caveat: Absence not proof of absence — many companies keep AI private

brief_summary: Acme sits at the 47th percentile of the Industrial Robotics 50–200-person cell. The top quartile consistently names a dedicated AI leader and publishes 3–5 LLM-engineering roles; Acme shows 0 and 1 respectively. This is the hook for outbound.
